about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: Dr. Felaco
about.text1: nutritionist biologist, curious researcher in food and nature.
about.text2: I teach support in a middle school, passionate about educational and didactic methods.
about.text3: I provide methodological tools with love and pleasure to help growth with simplicity and serenity.
about.text4: My modus operandi is to help people build their psycho-physical well-being through prevention and education.
about.quote1: Health comes from knowledge and wisdom comes from external guidance.
about.quote2: We are what we eat, say and do!
